text:
{
  "title": "Health Evidence Uncertainty Envelope",
  "group_name": "health_evidence_uncertainty_envelope",
  "family": "missingness_uncertainty",
  "summary": "Represent how narrow or wide each student's plausible health-risk state remains when unanswered lifestyle and physiology fields are treated as bounded uncertainty rather than filled with one assumed value.",
  "depends_on": [],
  "strategy": "Create a deterministic protective score in [0,1] for each non-demographic health feature: sleep_duration scores 1 in [7,9], linearly falls to 0 at <=5 or >=10; heart_rate scores 1 at <=70 and linearly falls to 0 at >=100; bmi scores 1 in [18.5,24.9] and linearly falls to 0 at <=16 or >=34.82; calorie_expenditure scores 1 inside the training 25th-75th percentile band and linearly falls to 0 at the 1st and 99th percentiles; step_count scores 0 at <=2000 and 1 at >=10000; exercise_duration scores 0 at 0 and 1 at >=45; water_intake scores 1 in [2.0,3.5] and linearly falls to 0 at <=0.75 or >=4.72; diet_type maps balanced=1, veg=0.8, non-veg=0.5; stress_level maps low=1, medium=0.5, high=0; sleep_quality maps good=1, average=0.5, poor=0; physical_activity_level maps active=1, moderate=0.6, sedentary=0; smoking_alcohol maps no=1, occasional=0.5, yes=0. For observed fields compute observed mean score; for missing health fields compute worst_case_score by assigning 0, best_case_score by assigning 1, midpoint_score, interval_width, observed_evidence_fraction, numeric_missing_uncertainty_share, and categorical_missing_uncertainty_share. Exclude gender from the health score but add a neutral gender_known flag. Unknown categorical values are treated as missing; if every scored field is missing, set observed mean to 0.5, worst case to 0, best case to 1, and observed fraction to 0. Web background used: https://medinform.jmir.org/2025/1/e79307 and https://www.publichealth.columbia.edu/research/population-health-methods/missing-data-and-multiple-imputation.",
  "expected_signal": "This may separate rows whose observed evidence already strongly supports fit or unhealthy from rows that remain compatible with several classes only because high-impact fields are absent, which can clarify minority-class boundaries under balanced accuracy.",
  "risk": "The hand-built bounds may duplicate parts of prior missingness and guideline-deviation signals, and the assumed best/worst health scale can be unstable if the competition's missingness mechanism is synthetic or not behaviorally meaningful."
}
